ham.subject: Out of Office: Unavailable till 15th June
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I am currently out of office and will return on 15th June. I will not have access to emails during this period. For immediate assistance, please contact my colleague Priya Patel at priya.patel@example.com or call the office line.

Thanks,
Rajesh Kumar

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Verify Now!
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. To restore full access and avoid permanent loss of funds, you must verify your identity immediately.

Please click <URL> and enter your wallet ID and recent transaction details. Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in permanent account closure.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Security Team
